AccessDenied: You need at least Master access for the scheduler.
Usage: Syntax: !scheduler list | !scheduler <name> new "<start-cron>" "<stop-cron>" <bots> | !scheduler <name> show | !scheduler <name> edit start|stop|bots <value> | !scheduler <name> enable|disable | !scheduler <name> delete. Example: !scheduler work new "0 8 * * 1-5" "0 22 * * 1-5" @ALL
MissingBots: Please provide at least one bot or @ALL.
ScheduleCreated: Schedule '{0}' was created: Start {1}, Stop {2}, Bots {3}.
UnknownEditField: Unknown field. Use start, stop or bots.
CronFiveFields: Cron must have 5 fields: minute hour day month weekday.
